driverInfo.control: Check and control the total request count in request files
driverInfo.allBatchRequests: Check and control all the batch request count
driverInfo.totalRequest: Check and control all the programs' total request count
driverInfo.refNoAllJoborders: Reference No in All Job Orders

requestMechanism.request2: If the repeated request is the last, then it should be implemented.
requestMechanism.requestCheckBox: If the repeated request is not completed, then it should be implemented.
requestMechanism.answer: The response to be sent to the device for requests canceled due to repetition
requestMechanism.ans3: Do not send anything to the device
requestMechanism.infoText1: In this case, repeated requests are carried out. If the repeated request is already in distribution, no new request is sent to the distributor. The final status of the distribution is transmitted to the device.
requestMechanism.infoText2: In this case, it is executed only if the last request is repeated. If the repeated request is already in distribution, no new request is sent to the distributor. The final status of the distribution is transmitted to the device.
requestMechanism.infoText3: In this case, only if the repeated request is a request that has not been previously completed in distribution. If the repeated request is already in distribution, a new request will not be sent to the distributor.
